message:
refactor(core): extract merge-classifier helpers and flatten btrfs test modules

Decompose the monolithic classify_merge_pair() match into five focused
helpers (classify_data_block_write_pair, classify_directory_add_pair,
classify_xattr_update_pair, classify_extent_update_pair,
classify_inode_metadata_pair) each gated behind #[cfg(test)]. Add
merge_safe() and merge_unsafe() constructors to eliminate repeated
struct literals. Narrow MVCC store read-guard scope and rename shadowing
variable in integration tests.

Flatten RAID profile, stripe resolution, and DEV_ITEM test functions in
ffs-ondisk/btrfs.rs out of inner modules into top-level mod tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
